references.passiveText: An old healer once told me about a similar madness that struck a settlement decades ago.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} treated survivors of a mass delirium event thirty years ago in a mining village {location_hint}. They said the miners broke into a sealed cavern and breathed something ancient. Most recovered after the cavern was sealed again, but a few never came back fully. {target_npc} might still have notes on the treatment they used. They live alone now, but they'd talk to someone who came bearing {quest_item} as a professional courtesy.

references.passiveText: The {quest_item} from those caves has unusual properties that certain collectors would pay dearly for.
references.triggerDialogue: I shouldn't be saying this, but there are scholars {location_hint} who study exactly the kind of mind-affecting compounds you've been dealing with. {target_npc} among them. They're not malicious: they're researchers trying to understand ancient alchemical techniques. If you brought them a sample, they'd pay well and might provide insights that our local alchemist couldn't match. Just be careful who you trust with something that powerful.
